text:
All line files 

VALUES: 11-digit numeric value, can include leading zeros. 
Ex. 00002060440 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: The NDC is reported in an 11-digit format, which is divided into three sections. The first five digits 
indicate the manufacturer or the labeler; the next four digits indicate the ingredient, strength, dosage 
form and route of administration; and the last two digits indicate the packaging. The FDA assigns the 
manufacturer portion of the
